title: EoE ever win any awards
wikitext:
[]: EoE ever win any awards?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 31, 2007 7:02 pm According to this Viz Media merchandise catalogue my stepbrother gave me, on the page about the Eva manga, one "key point" was the following: ~The feature film, The End of Evangelion won a Japanese Academy Award in 1997. I was just wondering if this is true and or did EoE win any awards? You'd think it would just because the message is brilliant even if it is something of a head trip. "Dudde..." @_@ Although in terms of headtrips, THAT award should go to EoTV, ah-ha-ha. I slay me.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Thu Feb 01, 2007 12:32 pm [url]http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Japanese_Academy_Awards[/url] Not best picture.

Article: EoE ever win any awards
[]: EoE ever win any awards?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 31, 2007 7:02 pm According to this Viz Media merchandise catalogue my stepbrother gave me, on the page about the Eva manga, one "key point" was the following: ~The feature film, The End of Evangelion won a Japanese Academy Award in 1997. I was just wondering if this is true and or did EoE win any awards? You'd think it would just because the message is brilliant even if it is something of a head trip. "Dudde..." @_@ Although in terms of headtrips, THAT award should go to EoTV, ah-ha-ha. I slay me.
